site.name: MapSwitch
site.tagline: Open any location in the map app you actually like.

home.title: Open any map link in your app
home.subtitle: Paste a Google, Apple, Waze or Yandex link — or coordinates, or a Plus Code — and pick the app you want. Or make a neutral link others can open in their own app.

paste.placeholder: Paste a map link, "lat, lng", or a Plus Code…
paste.error: Couldn't read a location from that. Try another link, or paste coordinates like 48.8584, 2.2945.

share.title: Share a place
share.subtitle: Create a neutral link. Whoever opens it picks their own map app.

open.noLocation: This link has no location in it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your default map app. This is stored only in this browser — nowhere else.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.anonymousBody: Without an account, MapSwitch stores nothing about you. Share links carry the place in the URL itself — there is no database of where you've been. Your preferred app is saved only in this browser (localStorage), with no tracking cookies. When a shortened link (like maps.app.goo.gl) needs expanding, it's resolved on the server against a strict allow-list of map domains, and the coordinates are never logged or reported anywhere.
privacy.accountBody: If you sign in, we store your email, a hashed password and/or your OAuth and passkey identifiers, your saved short links (with their coordinates and label), and your app preference — in a self-hosted SQLite database with encrypted off-site backups. Deleting your account removes all of it. Session cookies are httpOnly, Secure and SameSite=Lax. We still never log coordinates and use no third-party trackers.

about.title: About
about.p1: Someone sends you a Google Maps link, but you'd rather use Apple Maps, Waze or Radarbot. MapSwitch reads the location out of any map link and lets you open it wherever you like.
about.p2: It also works the other way: share a neutral link, and whoever opens it picks their own app.
about.p3: Open, self-hosted, privacy-first. New map apps can be added one at a time.

account.name: Name
account.passkeyHint: Fastest and most secure — no password needed.
account.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
account.checkEmail: Almost there — check your email to verify your address.
account.resetSent: If that email exists, a reset link is on its way.
account.resetDone: Password updated. You can sign in now.
account.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
account.loginRequired: Sign in to save short links and see your history.
